prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock price volatility for large-cap technology consulting stocks like Accenture, assuming an annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. For an 18-day period, this translates to roughly 3-4% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift consistent with long-term market trends. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the geometric Brownian motion model commonly used for stock price forecasting over short to medium term horizons.
